languages.text: "Голод сего машинного духа слишком велик — мои подношения едва ли утолят его. Он жаждет единения с благословенной гальваникой генератора".
"The hunger of this machine spirit is too great. My offerings will hardly satiate it. It yearns for communion with the blessed galvanics of the generator."
languages.original_text: "Голод сего машинного духа слишком велик — мои подношения едва ли утолят его. Он жаждет единения с благословенной гальваникой генератора".

traits.locale_text: "The hunger of this machine spirit is too great. My offerings shall hardly satiate it. It yearns for communion with the blessed galvanics of the generator."
"The hunger of this machine spirit is too great. My offerings shall hardly satiate it. It yearns for communion with the blessed galvanics of the generator."
"The hunger of this machine spirit is too great. My offerings will hardly satiate it. It yearns for communion with the blessed galvanics of the generator."
"The hunger of this machine spirit is too great. My offerings will hardly satiate it. It yearns for communion with the blessed galvanics of the generator."

languages.text: «El hambre del espíritu máquina es demasiado grande. Mis ofrendas no pueden saciarlo. Ansía la comunión con el bendito galvanismo del generador».
languages.original_text: "The hunger of this machine spirit is too great. My offerings will hardly satiate it. It yearns for communion with the blessed galvanics of the generator."

traits.locale_text: «El hambre del espíritu máquina es demasiado grande. Mis ofrendas no pueden saciarlo. Ansía la comunión con el bendito galvanismo del generador».

languages.text: “这个机魂过于饥渴。我的供奉远远无法满足它。它渴望与发电机那受祝的电流建立连接。”
languages.original_text: "The hunger of this machine spirit is too great. My offerings will hardly satiate it. It yearns for communion with the blessed galvanics of the generator."

traits.locale_text: “这个机魂过于饥渴。我的供奉远远无法满足它。它渴望与发电机那受祝的电流建立连接。”

languages.text: "Der Hunger des Maschinengeistes ist zu groß. Meine Opfer werden ihn wohl kaum stillen. Er sehnt sich nach der Vereinigung mit der gesegneten Galvanik des Generators."
languages.original_text: "The hunger of this machine spirit is too great. My offerings will hardly satiate it. It yearns for communion with the blessed galvanics of the generator."

traits.locale_text: "Der Hunger des Maschinengeistes ist zu groß. Meine Opfer werden ihn wohl kaum stillen. Er sehnt sich nach der Vereinigung mit der gesegneten Galvanik des Generators."

languages.text: « La faim qui ronge cet esprit de la machine est trop dévorante. Mes offrandes ne suffiront pas à l'assouvir. Il brûle de communier avec les cellules galvaniques sacrées du générateur. »
languages.original_text: "The hunger of this machine spirit is too great. My offerings will hardly satiate it. It yearns for communion with the blessed galvanics of the generator."

traits.locale_text: « La faim qui ronge cet esprit de la machine est trop dévorante. Mes offrandes ne suffiront pas à l'assouvir. Il brûle de communier avec les cellules galvaniques sacrées du générateur. »

languages.text: "Bu makine ruhunun açlığı çok büyük. Benim adaklarım onu zor doyurur. Jeneratörün mübarek galvanizleriyle birleşmeye can atıyor."
languages.original_text: "The hunger of this machine spirit is too great. My offerings will hardly satiate it. It yearns for communion with the blessed galvanics of the generator."

traits.locale_text: "Bu makine ruhunun açlığı çok büyük. Benim adaklarım onu zor doyurur. Jeneratörün mübarek galvanizleriyle birleşmeye can atıyor."

languages.text: 「この機械霊の飢えは大きすぎる。私の供え物はほとんど満足させないだろう。それは発電機の祝福された電気と共にすることを望んでいる。」
languages.original_text: "The hunger of this machine spirit is too great. My offerings will hardly satiate it. It yearns for communion with the blessed galvanics of the generator."

traits.locale_text: 「この機械霊の飢えは大きすぎる。私の供え物はほとんど満足させないだろう。それは発電機の祝福された電気と共にすることを望んでいる。」
